description_long: This object consists of five standard orange traffic cones arranged in a straight line on a rectangular section of asphalt road. Each cone is made of flexible plastic, featuring a wide, square base for stability and a conical upper section with alternating orange and white reflective stripes. The cones display varying degrees of surface wear, with some showing dirt, scuff marks, and faded colors, indicating regular outdoor use. The bases are thick and slightly textured, designed to prevent tipping and provide grip on the road surface. The reflective stripes are positioned near the top and middle of each cone, enhancing visibility in low-light conditions. No logos or text markings are visible on any of the cones.
description: A group of five orange and white striped traffic cones with square bases, arranged on a section of asphalt. The cones show signs of wear and are designed for high visibility and stability.
description_view_0: Five traffic cones are lined up side by side on a road surface, showing their conical shapes, square bases, and visible wear.
description_view_1: The cones are viewed from the end, appearing aligned in a single file, emphasizing their height and the uniformity of their bases.
description_view_2: The cones are again seen from the side, with their reflective stripes and varying surface conditions clearly visible.
description_view_3: Viewed from the opposite end, the cones are aligned in a row, highlighting the symmetry and the road markings beside them.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Each cone has two white reflective stripes, one near the tip and one around the middle, both of moderate width.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of each cone is rounded and solid, colored orange, with no attachments or additional features.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, thick, and made of sturdy plastic, designed for stability and grip, with some visible dirt and wear.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on any of the cones.
attribute_condition: The cones are in a worn and dirty condition, with visible scuff marks, fading, and surface grime.
